meta.title: Pricing — German Nursing Pathway

freeTrial.title: Try before you subscribe
freeTrial.body: 3 free pathway AI conversations and intro learning modules — no card required.

checkout.signInBody: Use the same email you used when you registered your interest.

upgradeEssentialBody: An Essential plan unlocks unlimited pathway chat and full resources.
